title: Minecraft but everything is Random
description: This datapack make your gameplay random , random potion effects,block drops are random and more.
body:
Welcome to Ultimate Randomizer Chaos, the datapack combo that turns your Minecraft world into pure, unfiltered madness. If normal survival feels too chill, this pack basically says: nah bro, let’s make life unpredictable 😭🔥

### ⚙ How to Use
Drop the pack in your datapacks folder and run:  
/function randomtoggle:true to activate  
/function randomtoggle:false to disable 

**Video Tutorial** : https://youtu.be/-IB7y9XDHZY

### 🌀 What’s Inside
This bundle mixes multiple chaos datapacks into one setup:  
Random Block Drops: Every block gives wild, unexpected loot.  
Random TNT Spawns: TNT appears near you at random moments.  
Random Mob Spawns: Any mob can drop on you out of nowhere.  
Random Potion Effects: Good, bad, cursed — all randomized.  

📁 Installation
Your download has multiple datapacks inside one ZIP.
Extract it first, then drop all included packs into your world’s datapacks folder.

## ➡️ Make sure to read the included README.txt.
